name: Prophets of Science Fiction
overview: The series covers the life and work of leading science fiction authors of the last couple of centuries. It depicts how they predicted and, accordingly, influenced the development of scientific advancements by inspiring many readers to assist in transforming those futuristic visions into everyday reality.

trailers.title: RIDLEY SCOTT Prophets of SciFi - RAY DILLON Animation Segments - ISAAC ASIMOV - Science Channel
